title: stablecoins / mica regulation / digital euro | Speech Neutral | Denis Beau: Stablecoins - what strategic choices for Europe?
summary: Denis Beau, First Deputy Governor of the Bank of France, outlined Europe's strategic response to stablecoins at the EUROFI High Level Seminar on March 26, 2026. He emphasized the need to preserve the two-tier monetary system while developing tokenized finance, advocating for a triple objective: adapting central bank money services, supporting tokenized private money from European institutions, and designing adequate regulation. Beau highlighted that MiCA is the world's first comprehensive crypto regulatory framework but requires strengthening, particularly regarding stablecoin use for everyday payments and multi-issuance regulation.
